chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5578 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.23386/2021. 2. For orders on CMA No.23387/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.05.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent. It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Salman Paper Products (Pvt.) Ltd. & Others v. Federation of Pakistan & Others (CP D 2758 of 2021) as approved by the honourable Supreme Court in the case of Collector of Customs v. Bilal Traders & Another (CPLA 1142-K/2023), therefore, this petition may be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of ratio so illumined supra. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
